meaning: Ha Meem (special letters at start of chapter)
The Mighty One (a name/attribute of Allah)
The All-Wise (one of Allah's names, following العَزِيزِ)
what (referring to the things mentioned after it: the heavens and earth)
and the earth (object of خَلَقْنَا/we created)
between them two (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
those who turn away (subject of كَفَرُوا)
you (all) call upon (the false deities besides اللَّهِ)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes after)
what (asking about something in the ayah)
of the earth (possessed by something in the ayah)
or (connecting two alternatives in أَرُونِى 'show me')
a trace/piece of evidence (of عِلْمٍ knowledge)
more/most lost from the right way (describes مَنْ - who)
those who are heedless (plural, in nominative case)
and when (connects to حُشِرَ - were gathered)
And when (connecting this condition to what came before)
it (our verses) is being recited (to them)
upon them (who are being recited to in تُتْلَىٰ)
came to them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا)
magic (something the disbelievers said about قَالَ the truth)
or rather (introducing the question 'or do they say he made it up?' in يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ)
he made it up (object of يَقُولُونَ)
I made it up (referring to what they claim about the Quran)
a thing (that is affected by تَمْلِكُونَ - you possess)
with/by what (referring to what they spread/pour forth in تُفِيضُونَ)
you all pour forth (addressing the disbelievers in this ayah)
in it (referring to what they plunge into تُفِيضُونَ)
he was sufficient (subject of قُلْ - say)
as a witness (object of كَفَىٰ - sufficient)
and between you all (connected to بَيْنِى in the ayah)
The Most Forgiving (One of Allah's names)
it is being done (passive of يَفْعَلُ)
and not (negates يُفْعَلُ - what will be done)
with/by you all (object of يُفْعَلُ - what will be done)
except/only (excluding what follows from what was mentioned before)
what (asking about what will be done with me)
to me (connected to يُوحَىٰٓ - is revealed)
and you all rejected/denied (connected to أَرَءَيْتُمْ - 'have you seen')
and he witnessed (connected to كَفَرْتُم - you disbelieved)
Israel (the prophet Jacob's other name, meaning 'servant of God')
similar to it, like it (after عَلَىٰ)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
he guides (the subject is اللَّهَ - Allah)
the people (object of لَا يَهْدِى - does not guide)
and he said (subject: those who disbelieved)
if (hypothetical, introducing a condition that did not happen)
it was (describing something in لَوْ if/had condition)
any good thing (object of كَانَ - was)
to him/it (referring to what they disbelieved in)
Moses (in this ayah, referring to the Book of Moses)
and this (referring to the Quran, connecting it to كِتٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ)
one who confirms (describes كِتٰبٌ - a book)
a language (being confirmed as Arabic in this ayah)
and good news (for الْمُحْسِنِينَ - those who do good)
for the (specific) ones who do good deeds
so/then not (connects to previous statement about those who say 'Our Lord is Allah')
and not (connects to فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ - 'then no fear upon them')
those (pointing to people far away) (subject of أَصْحٰبُ)
those who remain forever (describing the people of Paradise)
as a reward (for what they used to do)
because of what (they did in يَعْمَلُونَ)
they do/are doing work (referring to those who will be in Paradise forever)
the human being (object of وَصَّيْنَا - we advised)
with difficulty (describes وَضَعَتْهُ - she delivered him)
and his weaning (subject with حَمْلُهُ of ثَلٰثُونَ شَهْرًا)
a month (being counted as part of ثَلٰثُونَ thirty)
he reached (subject of وَبَلَغَ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً - and he reached forty years)
a year (object of بَلَغَ أَرْبَعِينَ - he reached forty)
O my Lord! (calling upon the Lord)
I thank (in أَنْ أَشْكُرَ - that I thank)
Your blessing (object of أَشْكُرَ - to thank)
the one which (feminine, referring to نِعْمَتَكَ - Your favor)
upon me (connected to نِعْمَتَكَ - Your favor)
you are pleased with him (object of أَعْمَلَ)
and make good! (as a command to Allah)
and indeed I (the one who تُبْتُ/repented)
the Muslims (those who submit to Allah)
those who (plural) (subject of نَتَقَبَّلُ - we accept)
from them/away from them (object of نَتَقَبَّلُ)
best (of ما عَمِلُوا۟ - what they did)
and we overlook/forgive (the mistakes of أَصْحٰبِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ)
from/away from (connects to هُمْ in عَنْهُمْ)
their bad deeds (object of نَتَجَاوَزُ/we pass over)
in (connecting أَصْحٰبِ to what comes before)
who/which/that (connects to يُوعَدُونَ - they were promised)
ugh!/fie! (expression of disgust towards لِوٰلِدَيْهِ - his parents)
that (connects to أُخْرَجَ - I will be brought out)
Allah (as the object being called upon)
woe to you (said by a son to his parents)
this (referring to what was just mentioned)
except (in response to مَا هٰذَآ - 'what is this')
the first/ancient ones (object of إِلَّا أَسَاطِيرُ)
those (pointing to people far away) (subject of حَقَّ)
the saying, the statement (as the doer of حَقَّ - became true)
in (connects أُمَمٍ with what comes before)
nations, communities, peoples (acted upon by خَلَتْ)
from/of (connects قَبْلِهِم with what comes after)
before them (referring to nations mentioned in أُمَمٍ)
the jinn (part of مِّنَ meaning 'from/of the')
they were (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ)
and for each (connecting to previous statement)
ranks/levels (referring to the different levels people will have based on what they did)
and so that he pays them in full
their works/deeds (referring to the deeds of those mentioned in وَلِكُلٍّ)
and [on] the day (when those who disbelieved will be exposed to the Fire)
those who (refers to كَفَرُوا۟ - they disbelieved)
your (plural) good things (object of أَذْهَبْتُمْ - you exhausted)
and you all sought to enjoy
with/in/by it/her (referring to طَيِّبٰتِكُمْ - your good things)
so today (as object of تُجْزَوْنَ - you are recompensed)
you (all) are given what is due (for your arrogance)
punishment (object of تُجْزَوْنَ - you are recompensed)
the disgrace (punishment in عَذَابَ ٱلْهُونِ - punishment of disgrace)
because of what (connects to كُنتُمْ تَفْسُقُونَ - you used to defiantly disobey)
you all were (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)
in (connects حَيَاتِكُمُ with what comes before it)
and because of what (connects to previous reasons for punishment)
you all break away (from right conduct)
she passed by (before النُّذُرُ - the warners)
the warners (subject of خَلَتِ - passed away)
between (of يَدَيْهِ - his hands/in front of him)
that not (introducing what not to do in تَعْبُدُوٓا۟)
Allah (as the object being worshipped in تَعْبُدُوٓا۟)
a great/mighty (describing عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ - punishment of a day)
did you come to us? (questioning what was said in قَالُوٓا۟)
in order to turn us away (purpose of أَجِئْتَنَا)
with what (that تَعِدُنَا you promise us)
and I deliver to you all intensively
what (with emphasis) (object of أُرْسِلْتُ - I was sent)
with it/by it (referring to what was sent in أُرْسِلْتُ)
I see you all (as قَوْمًا/a people)
a people (object of أَرَىٰ - I see)
a showing up thing (object of رَأَوْهُ/they saw it)
they said (the people when they saw the cloud)
a thing showing up (describes the cloud in مُّسْتَقْبِلَ)
the one who will send rain upon us (predicate of عَارِضٌ)
rather/but rather (contradicting their claim that هٰذَا عَارِضٌ مُّمْطِرُنَا - this is a rain cloud)
it (referring to عَارِضٌ - the storm cloud)
a punishment (describes رِيحٌ/wind in this ayah)
any thing (acted on by تُدَمِّرُ - it destroys)
like that (connects to نَجْزِى - we recompense)
we reward/recompense (the ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ - criminal people)
in what/whatever (connected to مَكَّنَّاهُمْ - We established them)
in it (referring to what was given to them)
and we made/put (for them hearing) - connected to مَكَّنَّاهُمْ
hearing (as something given by جَعَلْنَا - we made/gave)
from them/away from them (connected to أَغْنَىٰ - availed)
and not (connects to previous negation of سَمْعُهُمْ - their hearing)
they were (subject of يَجْحَدُونَ - they denied)
they deny/are denying (the signs of Allah)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to يَجْحَدُونَ بِـَٔايٰتِ)
with them (referring to their hearing, sight, and hearts mentioned earlier)
with him/it (referring to what they used to mock)
around you all (referring to the people being addressed)
the signs (object of صَرَّفْنَا - we have explained)
Then why not / so why didn't (followed by نَصَرَهُمُ - help them)
towards you (receiving the turning/directing in وَلَّوْا۟)
a group (object of صَرَفْنَآ - we directed)
of the jinn (group listening to ٱلْقُرْءَانَ)
the Quran (object being listened to by الْجِنِّ)
be silent and listen! (command to a group)
then when/so when (referring to حَضَرُوهُ - they attended it)
O our people! (calling out to them)
a book (object of سَمِعْنَا - we heard)
Moses - a proper name borrowed from Hebrew/Ancient Egyptian
his two hands/forearms (that which is between)
he forgives/will forgive (the subject of this verb is Allah, as shown by the context)
your sins (object of يَغْفِرْ - He will forgive)
and He will protect you all (if you believe)
of the deity, of the god
able to escape/elude (فَلَيْسَ - then he is not)
in (connects ضَلٰلٍ to what comes before)
And have they not (connected to يَرَوْا۟)
by their creation (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - the heavens and earth)
he gives life (acted on by قادر)
the dead (object of يُحْۦِىَ - gives life to)
it is being displayed (on النَّارِ - the Fire)
those who (referring to كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
this (pointing to something in the ayah)
because of what (connects to تَكْفُرُونَ - you used to disbelieve)
so be patient! (connected to كَمَا صَبَرَ that follows)
he was patient (like the messengers mentioned after)
and do not (connected to فَٱصْبِرْ - be patient)
that which (relates to يُوعَدُونَ - they are promised)
except (what follows is excluded from يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ - they remained)
